_comment_ingest: Local push endpoint for the browser extension. Binds 127.0.0.1 only. token auto-generates into data/ingest_token.txt on first run.
_comment_ebay: eBay UK last-sold scraped SERVER-SIDE (tracker/prices/ebay.py). Auto-enabled for any watchlist item with an ebay_query.
_comment_ebay_bin: Cheapest active Buy-It-Now listing per product (with buy URL). Refreshed in a STAGGERED rolling loop: `batch` products per monitor cycle. At batch=2 over a 5-min poll, all ~73 refresh about every 3 hours (~0.5 req/min, very gentle on eBay). Shares the warmed cookie jar with ebay_sold. Bump batch to 6 for ~hourly.

stores._comment_awin: Blocked to direct scraping. Awin datafeed route (see README); flip enabled:true + add feed_url when approved.

_comment_sets: Set catalog for the gallery. logo_url from pokemontcg.io / scrydex.
_comment_watchlist: Full product lineup per set (researched 2026-06-14). kind: booster_box | etb | etb_pc | booster_bundle | booster_pack | build_battle. image_url = Total Cards Shopify CDN (or official tcg.pokemon CDN). totalcards URLs verified via .js.
